
---
title: ""
author: ""
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  word_document:
    toc: true
    number_sections: true
geometry:
  - top=30mm
  - left=25mm
  - right=25mm
  - bottom=30mm
header-includes:
  - \usepackage{fancyhdr}
  - \usepackage{graphicx}
  - \pagestyle{fancy}
  - \fancyhead[L]{Rapport d'Analyse GHS-LSMS}
  - \fancyhead[R]{Nigeria Wave 4}
---




```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = FALSE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.align = "center"
)
```


\begin{titlepage}
    \begin{flushleft}
        \includegraphics[width=4cm]{images/logo.png}
    \end{flushleft}
    
    \centering
    \vspace*{2cm}
    
    {\huge \textbf{Analyse Socio-Démographique du Nigeria}} \\
    \vspace{0.5cm}
    {\Large Étude du niveau d'éducation et des disparités régionales} \\
    
    \vfill
    
    {\Large \textbf{Membres du groupe :}} \\
    \vspace{0.8cm}
    {\large LO Ousmane} \\
    {\large WATTARA Ousmane} \\
    
    \vfill
    
    {\large Projet Statistique sous R} \\
    {\large \textbf{ENSAE Pierre NDIAYE}} \\
    {\large Année académique 2025-2026}
\end{titlepage}

\newpage
